name: snarl-sopi-backend
description: Snarl & Sopi operator backend — v5.02: harden Payday link — only a real UUID is accepted as paydayCustomerId; a kennitala typed into either field is resolved to the customer id, and a non-UUID stored value now shows not-linked instead of a 400. Fixes GET /invoices HTTP 400 from a kennitala saved into the customer-id field.
